title: Wu-Tang Clan founding member Oliver 'Power' Grant dies at 52
fullText:
Music // 1 day ago
 P!nk, Phil Collins, INXS, Oasis among Rock Hall's 2026 nominees
 Feb. 25 (UPI) -- P!nk, Phil Collins, Mariah Carey, INXS, New Edition, Iron Maiden, Shakira, Oasis, Lauryn Hill, New Edition, Jeff Buckley among Rock Hall's 2026 nominees.
summary: Wu-Tang Clan founding member Oliver "Power" Grant has died at the age of 52. No cause of death for the producer has been publicly disclosed yet.
